nodes.name: Scaled flowerpiercer
nodes.summary: The scaled flowerpiercer (Diglossa duidae) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in the tepuis of Brazil and Venezuela. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. References
nodes.shortSummary: The scaled flowerpiercer (Diglossa duidae) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in the tepuis of Brazil and Venezuela.

nodes.name: Diglossa
nodes.summary: Diglossa（Diglossa）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联14种鸟类，如Chestnut-bellied flowerpiercer、Glossy flowerpiercer、Moustached flowerpiercer等14种鸟类。
